untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting slope direction ('20MA is sloping up', '50MA is sloping up', '200MA is sloping up') and parallel alignment of moving averages ('almost parallel'). The allowed operators do not include slope detection (e.g., comparing MA values across multiple bars) or angular divergence measures. These conditions require multi-bar lookback or derivative calculations not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated using: (1) each MA above previous close as proxy for upslope, (2) price above all three MAs. The 'almost parallel' condition and true slope direction validation cannot be expressed with available indicators and operators. A complete implementation would require custom slope or divergence indicators.
